_note: Single source of truth for every PR-comment slash command in this repo, read by pr_help_command.yml (/help). Add an entry here whenever a new PR command is added -- same manual-sync convention as RELATED_AUTOMATION_PATHS in .github/scripts/src/validation/ai-config-validation/constants.ts. trust values: 'owners' = root OWNERS approvers; 'github-owners' = the narrower .github/OWNERS (kept in sync with .cursor/OWNERS) approvers gating /ai-approved and /ci-approved; 'collaborator' = any repo collaborator with write access; 'member-or-owner' = GitHub author_association; 'none' = no trust gate.

commands.description: Add the lgtm label (any write collaborator except the PR author). Root OWNERS approvers also get 'approved'. A native GitHub Approve review does the same.
Remove the lgtm label from this PR. Unlike /lgtm, the PR's own author may use this.
Approve this PR for merge (root OWNERS approvers only).
Retract your approval (root OWNERS approvers only).
Block this PR from merging until /hold cancel lifts it. Unrelated to /hold-e2e, which only pauses Hot Cluster E2E.
Retest Hot Cluster E2E for this PR, merged with the current base branch tip. Cancels an in-progress run for this PR first, if any.
Cancel an in-progress Hot Cluster E2E run for this PR.
Pause Hot Cluster E2E only (e2e-hold label) -- not the same as /hold. No new E2E run is dispatched until /retest-e2e; e2e-hold also blocks the merge pool.

Deploy a manual console + kubevirt-plugin instance for this PR. Cluster name/infra type are auto-resolved from the PR's base branch; the cluster is provisioned automatically if not already up. Credentials are sent to Slack.
Tear down this PR's manual console + kubevirt-plugin instance (Helm release, trigger ConfigMap, and OAuth user).
Re-run Jira ticket validation for this PR.
Mark AI/editor configuration changes on this PR as security-reviewed.
Mark CI configuration changes (.github/, ci-scripts/, Dockerfile, playwright-runner-hc-e2e.sh) on this PR as security-reviewed.
Cherry-pick this PR to another release branch once merged.
